---
title: "A few of my projects"
format: html
---

::: grid
::: g-col-6
## Advent of Code solutions

Most of my solutions for Advent of Code are done in [Java](https://github.com/abirks/aoc_java). The problems from all years are collected in a single project with common utilities and testing.

For 2020 they're in [LabVIEW](https://github.com/abirks/aoc20). Coincidentally, that's also the only year I've completed fully. The other years still have a couple of stars missing 😥.

## Muon telescope

Still in the planning phase

:::

::: g-col-6
## Gamma spectrometer

A simple gamme spectrometer using a LYSO crystal, a SIPM sensor and an oscilloscope. The goal was to make a minimum-effort scintillation detector without access to a proper lab.

## Synacor challenge

[Synacor](synacor/synacor.qmd)

My solution to the synacor challenge. The 


More text

:::
:::
